name_cn:
【Top Original】🔥Full Leather Packaging
The Double G represents the unremitting effort to reshape and reutilize classic silhouettes. Matching Double G accessories compose a modern narrative, and classic elements are cleverly presented in a renewed style on this GGMarmont V-shaped quilted leather waist bag.
Material✨Uses boutique-quality texture, natural full-grain imported cowhide, and matching hardware.
Dimensions 12x12.5x7cm Model 739599
